assistant_responses: Restored the DAG contract and completion requirements, then updated them to 23 tasks. Variant 47 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: Concise headings are fine, but explicit acceptance criteria must remain in the bootstrap contract.
